notes: Market quick-trade polish + end-of-cycle digest. The Market now remembers the last quantity you typed per commodity, flags the best known world to flip a good you buy here (profit per light-year) with a 💡 hint, lets you sort each tier by that same margin, and adds a one-click 💰 Sell entire hold (legal goods only — contraband is held back). Separately, a new 📋 Cycle recap line rolls up each cycle's production, arrivals (ships launched, missions and mandates completing, crews arriving), and rising threats (new crises, pirate activity, raids, convoy losses) into one compact summary, alongside the existing 💰 Cycle accounts money ledger — so a busy empire's log doesn't bury the headline in scattered lines.
